assertions.reason: Link pills match surface2 background (rgb(31,31,31)) and rounded20 (20px), but computed text style is font-size 16px and color rgb(255,255,255), not required 17px and rgba(255,255,255,0.65).
Transactions section heading computed styles are font-size 25px and color rgb(255,255,255), matching heading3 + neutral1 requirement.
Transactions table is in empty-state (no non-colspan data cells rendered), so body4 13px data-cell typography cannot be validated through live rows.
Column header text nodes (Time/Type/Price/Amount/Wallet) compute to color rgba(255,255,255,0.65), matching neutral2.
Swap widget container computed width is 360px at desktop viewport.
Swap container styles match: background rgb(19,19,19), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12), border-radius 16px, padding 8px.
Both input sections (You pay / You receive) compute to background rgb(31,31,31), min-height 120px, border-radius 16px.

blockers.description: No live transaction rows available during session; transactions panel rendered empty state only.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded page and allowed market/trade API polling; table remained empty-state.
